rewritten_requirements: The system shall idle in a waiting state when the pump is not operating.
The system shall allow the buyer to insert a credit card into a card reader built into the pump.
The system shall read card details when a credit card is inserted.
The system shall allow the buyer to remove the credit card from the card reader.
The system shall validate the inserted credit card.
The system shall initialize the pump when the credit card is validated.
The system shall transition to the Delivering state when the fuel hose is removed from its holster.
The system shall start fuel delivery when the trigger on the nozzle is activated.
The system shall stop fuel delivery when the trigger on the nozzle is released.
The system shall transition to the Paying state after fuel delivery is complete.
The system shall debit the user's account when payment is made.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system never terminates but idles in a waiting state when the pump is not operating.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Notice that this system never terminates but idles in a waiting state when the pump is not operating.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The buyer can insert a credit card into a card reader built into the pump.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The buyer inserts a credit card into a card reader built into the pump.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system reads card details when the credit card is inserted.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This causes a transition to a Reading state where the card details are read

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The buyer can remove the credit card from the card reader.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Removal of the card triggers a transition to a Validating state

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system validates the inserted credit card.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the card is valid, the system initializes the pump

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system initializes the pump when the credit card is validated.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the card is valid, the system initializes the pump and, when the fuel hose is removed from its holster...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system transitions to the Delivering state when the fuel hose is removed from its holster.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...transitions to the Delivering state, where it is ready to deliver fuel

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Fuel delivery starts when the trigger on the nozzle is activated.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Activating the trigger on the nozzle causes fuel to be pumped

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Fuel delivery stops when the trigger on the nozzle is released.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...stops when the trigger is released (for simplicity, I have ignored the pressure switch that is designed to stop fuel spillage)

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system transitions to the Paying state after fuel delivery is complete.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After the fuel delivery is complete and the buyer has replaced the hose in its holster...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user's account is debited when payment is made.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...the system moves to a Paying state where the user’s account is debited
